latin: Inventor insanus, cum vehiculum temporale aedificavisset, puerum monuit: 'unum et viginti centesimae gigavatti opus est ut machinam operemur!' puer attonitus dixit: 'unum et viginti centesimae gigavatti?! ubi tantam vim inveniemus?'

questions.prompt: How much power does the machine need?

questions.target: He is astonished and worried about finding so much power
choices: He is astonished and worried about finding so much power

translation: The mad inventor, having built a time vehicle, warned the boy: '1.21 gigawatts are needed to operate the machine!' The stunned boy said: '1.21 gigawatts?! Where will we find so much power?'
